spec.name: Soul Sense Sphere
spec.summary: detects soul energy in a spherical envelope with active regulation while it runs
spec.effect_description: The caster inscribes a sigil that detects soul energy in a spherical envelope with active regulation while it runs. Effect range: long. Persistence: permanent.
